!newData.exists() || (($categoryKey === 'day_trips' || $categoryKey === 'mystery_breaks' || $categoryKey === 'scotland_highlands_islands' || $categoryKey === 'isle_of_ireland' || $categoryKey === 'european_breaks' || $categoryKey === 'steam_train_tours' || $categoryKey === 'cruises_ferries' || $categoryKey === 'theatre_concerts' || $categoryKey === 'sporting_breaks' || $categoryKey === 'history_military_breaks') && newData.hasChildren(['message', 'createdAtMs', 'createdByUid', 'source', 'categoryKey', 'categoryLabel']) && newData.child('message').isString() && newData.child('message').val().length > 0 && newData.child('message').val().length <= 2000 && newData.child('createdAtMs').isNumber() && newData.child('createdByUid').isString() && newData.child('createdByUid').val() === auth.uid && newData.child('source').isString() && newData.child('categoryKey').isString() && newData.child('categoryKey').val() === $categoryKey && newData.child('categoryLabel').isString() && newData.child('categoryLabel').val().length > 0 && newData.child('categoryLabel').val().length <= 120)
